title: How to Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store: The Complete Creator Guide — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text:
Selling digital products in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or other countries with banking restrictions or PayPal holds is a nightmare. You've tried Gumroad, Payhip, or Stripe but they keep your funds or limit your access due to Know-Your-Customer requirements or currency fluctuations. It's time to break free from these limitations and start getting paid instantly, globally, and without the need for KYC verification. In this guide, we'll show you how to set up a digital store with NOWPayments and sell your ebooks, courses, or art without the hassle of conventional payment platforms."

      "heading": "Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

NOWPayments is a game-changer for creators in restricted countries. With 300+ coins supported, including USDT, and no KYC requirements, you can accept payments directly from your buyers without going through a third-party payment processor. This means no holds, no delays, and no limitations on your earnings. By integrating NOWPayments with our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration, you can create a seamless payment experience for your buyers and get paid instantly, no matter where they are in the world.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, make sure you have a digital product to sell and a NOWPayments account. Don't worry if you're not tech-savvy - our setup process is designed to be straightforward and easy to follow. You'll also need to install our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration, which will allow you to generate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds for your buyers. This will make it easy for them to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, such as BTC, ETH, or USDT.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, follow these simple steps: Install the NOWPayments plugin on your website, configure your payment settings, and connect your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration. Once you've done this, you can start selling your digital products and receive payments directly from your buyers. Our plugin will automate the delivery of your products to your buyers, so you don't have to worry about manually sending files or tracking orders.
With NOWPayments, you can accept payments directly from your buyers without going through a third-party payment processor.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

To go live and make your first sale, simply add a product to your store, configure the payment settings, and start promoting your store to your audience. Our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration will make it easy for your buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, and our NOWPayments plugin will automate the payment and delivery process. When you receive a payment, our plugin will deliver the product to the buyer instantly, so you don't have to worry about manually sending files or tracking orders.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your system is running smoothly, you can start scaling your business by adding more products, promoting your store to a wider audience, and optimizing your payment and delivery pipeline. Our NOWPayments plugin will continue to automate the payment and delivery process, so you can focus on growing your business and increasing your earnings. With our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration, you can also add more features and functionality to your store, such as multi-chain QR code generation and live price feeds.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products? You can receive crypto payments for your digital products using NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports 300+ coins, including USDT, and does not require KYC verification. Our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration will make it easy for your buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, and our NOWPayments plugin will automate the payment and delivery process.
Our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration will make it easy for your buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, such as BTC, ETH, or USDT.

Your Action Checklist

To set up a digital store with NOWPayments and sell your digital products, follow these simple steps: Create a NOWPayments account and install the NOWPayments plugin on your website, Configure your payment settings and connect your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration, Add a product to your store and configure the payment settings, Promote your store to your audience and start selling, Automate the payment and delivery process using our NOWPayments plugin.
